titleStmt.title: SII 18.125: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 125. (B.K. No. 143 of 1933-34.) BIJĀPUR, BIJĀPUR TALUK, BIJĀPUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Front of a slab (A-23) in the Museum

summary.p: This inscription referring itself to the reign of Vikramāditya introduces his son Yuvarāja Mallikārjuna and Bhāyila-Chamūpa. The latters genealogy is given.
The record written in beautiful poetry is unfortunately not fully preserved.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© śrīnamastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūḷastaṁbhāya
saṁbhavē . śrīmaccaḷukyavaṁśalalāmaṁ caturudadhimēkhaḷāḷaṁkri
tadhātrīmaṁḍalamaṁ vikramadhāmaṁ nijabhujakripāṇadiṁ rakṣisidaṁ . piridāyāsadini
nnegaṁ taḷeda dhātrībhāramaṁ vikramābharaṇaṁgoppisi bēḷpudaṁ paḍedeventānuṁ diśādaṁtidikkariṇīpēcakacuṁba
naikasukhamaṁ śēṣōragaṁ bhōginīpariraṁbhōtsavamaṁ purāṇakamaṭhaṁ nidrāṁganā saṁgamaṁ . ©
© puduvillabdhivaraṁ nelakke beragillārppiṁge kūrppiṁge beccadarillājñege sīmeyilla taḷa tantrakkaṁtu
millāhavakkidirillōḍida vairigaḷgepavaṇillārddette kittetti pōgada durggatrayamilladēṁ
piriyanō cāḷukyacakrēśvaraṁ . Iralīguṁ caraṇā(ṁ)ḷi vipinadurggaṁ pādapīṭhasthaḷī giridurggaṁ nakharaśmijā
ḷa jaḷadurggaṁ vikramāditya nīṁ śaraṇāgeṁdapavāśritaṁge vanabhūbhṛttōyadurggāśri taṁgiravuṁṭe
tripadaikacakriya lalāṭāsthānadoḷ tōrppudu . Ātana taneyaṁ taṁdegamītane migi lenipa mahime
yiṁ yuvarājakhyātiverasurvviyaṁ taḷedātaṁ kēvaḷame mallikārjjunadēvaṁ . kaḍaloḷ puṭṭida maṇi
gaḷu paḍegume kaustubhada mahimeyaṁ nṛpataneyarppaḍegume kumārareṁbī paḍemātiṁ mallidēvama
himāspadamaṁ . maṇivesaraṁ paḍedu nabhōmaṇivōḷ beḷagugume śōṇamaṇigaḷ pesariṁdeṇikege
kumārarenisuvareṇeyenisuvarāro mallikārjjunanṛpanoḷ . Ātana rājyaśrīge nikētanamene taṁna bhuja
baḷaṁ maṁtrabaḷaṁ cāturddaṁtabaḷaṁ vikhyātige bhāyilacamūpanāśrayavādaṁ . Ātata kīrttiyenal
negaḷdātana dorevetta vaṁśavīryyaśrutavikhyātiyanabhivarṇnipeneṁbaṁ taṁ dvisahaśra jihvanāgalevērkkuṁ . © .
Ānavadyanakhaṁḍitamamaranadīśalilapravāhada ṁ[te ?] jagatpāvanamenisida bhāyiladēvana vaṁśaṁ
sakaḷavipravaṁśōttaṁsaṁ . Adu matteṁtene dānavamathanana nābhikamaḷadoḷ parimaḷadaṁ tudiyasi
daṁ tannacaturvvadanadoḷudiyise samastavēdaninādaṁ . Ājana manameṁba kanakāṁbujāta kiṁjalkapuṁjamene ja
niyisidaṁ trijagadvaṁdyaṁ dakṣaprajāpatipramukhanikhiḷamānasaputraru . Āvaroḷage vēdavē dāṁga
vidaṁ brahmadvitīyamūrttiyenaḷ bhūbhuvanamaneṟagisidaṁ brahmavarccasaṁ tanage sahaja menisi vasiṣṭhaṁ [.]
Ā paramabrahmapratirūpamenalu negaḷdamuniya pesariṁjagaduṁ vyāpise vasiṣṭagōtramiḷā
pāvanamāytudivyamanusūtradamōl . Ā gōtrajaroḷu bahuvidyāguṇacāritranira
tarārina riḷābhāgadoḷire gōviṁdaṁ śrīgeḍekoṭṭaṁ viśāḷavakṣasthaḷamaṁ . śrīvadhu vakṣadoḷire vākśrī
vadhu mukhakamaḷadoḷ virājise vijeyaśrīvadu nile nijabhujadoḷ gōviṁdaṁ kīrtti vadhuge vallabhanādaṁ
© priyamanoḍarisuva nuḍiyaltu yathārtthaṁ jagada manujaroḷ gōviṁdaṁ bhaya lōbhadurllabhaṁ bhūbhuva
nadoḷātanajanmabhūmi puṇyakṣētraṁ . Adaṟiṁdāpuruṣana puṭṭidanāḍuṁ kaliyugapratāpa kkoḷagā
dudaṁ baṇnisuvaḍe takkudu puṇyakṣētravarṇnanaṁ kēvaḷame . palavuṁ ratnāṁśugaḷ taḷetaḷe deregaḷa palavuṁ bandhadiṁ ce
lvu taṁnoḷe nele jaṁbūdvīpamaṁ maṁḍaḷisida parivēśaṁboliṁbāytu muktāphaḷa janmasthānavujriṁbhita
jaḷacarakōḷāhaḷadhvānamaṁtarvviluṭhatpāṭhīnavāśāmukhalikhitasamutphēnamaṁbhōni dhānaṁ . sa
radhi sarōvaramanaḷaṁkarisida dharaṇīsarōjakarṇnikeyeṁbaṁtire kapiḷakiraṇadaṁtaṁbaramaṁ pajjaḷisida
ttu mēru nagēṁdraṁ . Ā kṣōṇīdharavadhuvuṁ dakṣiṇadigmukhadoḷese vaśaśikhaṁḍadavō līkṣaṇasu
khamayamirppudu dakṣiṇabharatatrikhaṇḍadāryyākhaṇḍaṁ . karituragarajataratnambarakāncanaśasya garbba
menal santatamāgi madhyadēśaṁ dharāvadhūmadhyadēśamene sogayisuguṁ . Ā dēśada gaṁgā
yamnūdēviya madhyabhūmi pāvanamaṁtarvvēdiyenisittumaṁgaḷavēdi caturmmukha makhakketānādudaṟim
. © Ā vēdiniyoḷ maṇimayadhāmadinuttuṁgamenipa dēvāyatanastōmadinese vudu karaṇagrā
mavenal negaḷduvātibhaṭṭagrāmaṁ . bahuvēdadhvaniyiṁ samudraduliyaṁ kīḷmāḍugum yajñabhāgahavirbbhāgama
nīva viprajanadiṁ dēvarkkaḷiṁ kaḷpabhūruhamaṁ mannisalīvudaltagaru dhūmācāradim tāṇḍavakri
yeyaṁ puṭṭisuguṁ sikhaṇḍigene lakṣmīnūpuraṁ tatpuraṁ . Ā puradoḷ gōvindangī puruṣane puṇyapuru
ṣanene janiyisidaṁ śrīpatisatyāḷāpaṁ nārāyaṇan nijānvayatiḷakaṁ . manusūtrakkeḍe goṭṭa mu
ttinasaraṁ (.) cāritramūḷānitambinigālēpanaśyāndracandrana rasaṁ vikhyātividyāviḷāsini gāḷōkanadarppaṇamReadcandana.
pra lakṣmīvallabhaṁ śrīpadakke nivāsaṁ manameṁdoḍēvogaḷvenāṁ (nā) nārā yaṇakhyātiyaṁ . nārāyaṇa
nara tre pavitre rūpavati guṇavati kāṁtāratnavenipa lāhiṇi vāriruhōdarana lakṣmiyaṁ gele
ṁda taśikharaṁ jaḷarāśige kumudabaṁdhu puṭṭuvavōl bhāyiladaṁḍa nāthaśadriśamenalādu
vicaḷamenisida lakṣmiyinavanīśaṁ mallikārjjunaṁ kuḍe dharmmavyava sāyadoḷoṁdi
dore peṟaroḷare . © sāśvatakīrttiyaṁ taḷedanikkeladoḷ ramaṇīyamāgi
nastavanīyamappinaṁ sāśvatamappinaṁ vibudha
bhāyiladaṁḍanātha The continuation is broken off and lost.
Digital edition of SII 18.125 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
